tasks.title: Exam-only study week
tasks.description: Pause Delta projects and courses for this week. Study for the examination: list syllabus topics, revise weak areas, solve past questions, and keep a mistake log.

event_context.title: Exam period
event_context.raw_text: but you know i do have a examination of theory of computation on 7th of june , so i dont think i would be able to do much of the work
event_context.impact: Normal Delta coursework should pause or reduce during this event.
